name: py-sandra
description: Web-based GUI client for Apache Cassandra

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @py-sandra/server" "npm run dev -w @py-sandra/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @py-sandra/shared && npm run build -w @py-sandra/server && npm run build -w @py-sandra/client
